overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval RPG showing a female villager walking through a rural mill settlement with wooden log buildings and thatched roofs. The character interacts with NPCs and the environment before sitting on a bench outside the mill building.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mill courtyard with dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking away from the stone well toward the wooden mill building in the distance

entered.detail: circular stone well with wooden beams in the foreground
large log cabin structure with thatched roof and stone foundation
low stone retaining wall running along the right side of the path
dense green forest surrounding the clearing

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rural mill courtyard with a stone well in the foreground. The camera follows a woman in medieval peasant clothing walking along a dirt path toward a large wooden mill building with a thatched roof, surrounded by forest trees.

events.description: passes a woman standing by the stone wall on the right
encounters a man walking toward the mill entrance from the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the mill building, passing a standing woman and approaching a man

notable_agents.action: woman standing still by the stone wall, watching the main character pass by
man in peasant clothing walking toward the mill door, then walking alongside the main character

entered.detail: wooden plank door with iron hinges on the mill building
flat stone slabs forming a patio area near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the narrow path beside the mill building, passing a woman standing by the wall. The ground transitions from dirt to stone paving as she approaches the building entrance and meets a man walking toward the door.

events.description: the man enters the wooden door of the mill building
the woman sits down on a wooden bench against the building wall

agents.ego_description: sitting on a wooden bench outside the mill, looking around while the man enters the building

entered.detail: simple wooden bench against the log wall of the building
wooden barrels and buckets next to the bench
small square window with wooden shutters on the mill wall

segments.scene_description: The man enters the mill through the wooden door while the woman sits on a bench outside. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the seated woman against the log wall of the building, with wooden barrels visible beside her.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural mill settlement that transitions from an open courtyard to a focused view of a resting villager. It begins by following a woman in medieval peasant clothing as she walks from a stone well along a dirt path toward a large, thatched-roof mill building nestled among forest trees. As she progresses, the camera tracks her along a narrow path where the ground shifts from dirt to stone paving, passing another woman by the wall before she encounters a man near the entrance. The scene then shifts as the man enters the wooden door, leading the camera to come to a halt. Finally, the view settles on the woman as she sits on a bench against the log wall, flanked by wooden barrels.
